USAGE: This file provides examples and documentation. The app's default loading and templates are managed in templates.json.

CONSTRUCTION.CHAMBER: Snaps to beam path, dashed-box, transparent bg

TEMPLATE_EXAMPLES.NAME: Single Branch
TEMPLATE_EXAMPLES.USE_CASE: Standard hard X-ray beamline with dual DCMs and focusing mirrors.

TEMPLATE_EXAMPLES.NAME: Diagnostic Line
TEMPLATE_EXAMPLES.USE_CASE: High-stability monitoring with slit-screen assemblies before every optic.

TEMPLATE_EXAMPLES.NAME: Soft X-ray PES
TEMPLATE_EXAMPLES.USE_CASE: Spectroscopy line with vertical gratings and experimental station hutch.

TEMPLATE_EXAMPLES.NAME: Micro-focus Station
TEMPLATE_EXAMPLES.USE_CASE: Advanced station with up-shifting DCM and dual K-B focusing mirrors.

TEMPLATE_EXAMPLES.NAME: Vacuum Chamber Setup
TEMPLATE_EXAMPLES.USE_CASE: Demonstrates the new Floating Chamber construction snapped directly to the beam path.
